info.title: Quizymode API
info.description: Quizymode API with JWT Bearer authentication support

get.summary: Get settings for a specific user (Admin only)

put.summary: Update or create a setting for a specific user (Admin only)

get.summary: Get registered users with activity metrics (Admin only)
get.description: Returns a filterable, paged list of registered users plus page-view activity metrics for a selected time window.

get.summary: Get page-view activity for a specific user (Admin only)
get.description: Returns grouped URL history and activity summary for one registered user in a selected time window.

post.summary: Create category (Admin only)
Create keyword relation (Admin only)
post.description: Adds a keyword to navigation for a category. ParentKeywordId null = root (rank 1); otherwise rank 2 under that parent. "Other" is not allowed.

delete.description: Deletes a category only when it has no items. KeywordRelations for this category are removed.
Removes a keyword relation from navigation for a category. The keyword entity remains.

put.description: Updates a KeywordRelation's parent, sort order, or description. Set Approve=true to make the relation public (IsPrivate=false, IsReviewPending=false).

get.summary: Get audit logs with filters (Admin only)
get.description: Returns paginated audit logs with optional filtering by action types. Includes user email for logged-in users.

get.summary: List keywords available to add (Admin only)
get.description: Returns keywords that are not yet assigned to this category as navigation keywords, excluding "other".

get.summary: List all keyword relations (Admin only)
get.description: Returns KeywordRelation entries (excluding 'other'). Optional filters: category name, navigation rank, pendingOnly (relations awaiting review).

get.summary: Get current database size (Admin only)
get.description: Returns the current PostgreSQL database size and usage percentage relative to the 500MB free tier limit

get.summary: Get page-view analytics (Admin only)
get.description: Returns summary metrics, most visited pages, and recent page hits for anonymous and authenticated traffic.

get.summary: List private keywords pending review (Admin only)
get.description: Returns private keywords that are marked as review-pending so admins can approve or reject them.

post.summary: Approve a private keyword (Admin only)
post.description: Marks a private keyword as public and clears review-pending state so it no longer appears in the review list.

post.summary: Reject a private keyword (Admin only)
post.description: Keeps the keyword private but clears review-pending state so it no longer appears in the review list.

post.summary: Preview a repo-managed seed sync (Admin only)
post.description: Validates an uploaded seed manifest and returns only the delta for existing seeded items. Initial seed previews suppress the full item list.

post.summary: Apply a repo-managed seed sync (Admin only)
post.description: Upserts a repo-managed seed set using stable item seed IDs. Missing seeded rows in the database are recreated from the manifest.

post.summary: Track a SPA page view
post.description: Stores a page-view event for an anonymous or authenticated SPA route hit.

get.summary: Get unique categories
get.description: Returns unique categories with item counts and average stars, sorted by highest average rating first, then by name.

post.summary: Create a collection (optionally public for shareable link)

get.summary: Get collections for current user

post.summary: Rate a collection (or update your rating)
post.description: Any authenticated user can rate once per collection (including owner). Stars 1-5.

get.summary: Get collection rating stats and current user's rating

post.summary: Bookmark a collection
Add an item to a collection
post.description: Adds a quiz item to a collection. Body: { "itemId": "<guid>" }.

post.summary: Add multiple items to a collection
post.description: Adds multiple quiz items to a collection. Body: { "itemIds": ["<guid1>", "<guid2>", ...] }.

delete.summary: Remove an item from a collection
delete.description: Removes a quiz item from a collection.

get.summary: Get a collection by ID
get.description: View collection by ID. Allowed if collection is public or you are the owner. Otherwise 404.

get.summary: Search public collections
get.description: Returns public collections matching optional text (name/description), and/or items in the collection matching category, navigation keywords (L1/L2), and item tags.

get.summary: Get collections bookmarked by current user
List users who bookmarked this collection (owner only)

post.summary: Create a comment for an item

get.summary: Get comments
get.description: Returns comments. Optionally filter by itemId using ?itemId={guid}.

post.summary: Create a feedback submission
Create a new quiz item

get.summary: Get quiz items with filtering and pagination

post.summary: Create multiple items in bulk
post.description: Creates many items in a single request. Each item specifies its own category; isPrivate applies to all items.

get.summary: Get a single quiz item by id

put.summary: Approve an item for review (Admin only)
put.description: No request body. Approves the item (makes it public and removes from review board).

get.summary: Get items ready for review (Admin only)

put.summary: Reject an item from the review board (Admin only)
put.description: Rejects the item, keeps it private, clears ReadyForReview, and appends a rejection note to ReviewComments.
Admin endpoint to promote or demote items between global and private.
Sets the category for an item. Must specify either CategoryId or CategoryName.

post.summary: Upload JSON items into a new collection
post.description: Creates items (private for non-admin) and a new collection with a unique GUID name, adds items to it. Returns collection ID to navigate. URL is shareable.

get.summary: List item tag keyword names for a category
get.description: Returns sorted distinct names of keywords attached to items in the category (extras via ItemKeywords), respecting item and keyword visibility for the current user.

get.summary: Get descriptions for navigation path keywords
get.description: Returns the description for each keyword in the path (for breadcrumb tooltips). Category is the category name. Keywords is comma-separated list of keyword names in path order.

get.summary: Get navigation keywords with aggregates
get.description: Returns the next navigation layer (rank-1 or rank-2 keywords) based on current selection. Includes item counts and average ratings.

post.summary: Create or update a rating for an item
post.description: Creates a new rating or updates existing rating for the current user. Stars can be null or 1-5.

get.summary: Get ratings statistics
get.description: Returns ratings count and average for the specified item.

get.summary: Get current user's rating for an item
get.description: Returns the current user's rating for the specified item. Returns null if no rating exists.

post.summary: Create an import session from current study guide
Finalize import: create items from prompt or dedup results
Generate chunks and prompts for the session

get.summary: Get import session with chunks and results

post.summary: Submit AI response for a chunk
Submit deduplicated AI response

get.summary: Get current user's study guide

put.summary: Create or replace current user's study guide

get.summary: Get category and keyword taxonomy (from YAML, in-memory)
Get all settings for the current user
get.description: Retrieves all user-specific settings. Returns an empty dictionary if no settings exist. Requires authentication.

put.summary: Update or create a user setting
put.description: Updates an existing setting or creates a new one if it doesn't exist. Requires authentication.

get.summary: Check if username and/or email are available
get.description: Checks if the provided username and/or email are already registered. Returns availability status for each.

get.summary: Get the currently authenticated user
get.description: Returns the current user's profile information including name, email, role, and timestamps

put.summary: Update the name for the currently authenticated user

get.summary: Get a user by their ID
get.description: Admin only endpoint to get user details by ID

post.summary: Log login failure event
post.description: Logs a LoginFailed audit event. Can be called by anonymous users. Email is optional for privacy.

post.summary: Log user logout event
post.description: Logs a logout audit event for the current user. This should be called before the client signs out.

post.summary: Record policy acceptance(s) for the currently authenticated user
post.description: Creates auditable acceptance records keyed by user, policy type, and policy version. Repeating the same acceptance is idempotent.

settings.$ref: #/components/schemas/System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary`2[[System.String, System.Private.CoreLib, Version=10.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e],[System.String, System.Private.CoreLib, Version=10.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e]]

metadata.$ref: #/components/schemas/System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary`2[[System.String, System.Private.CoreLib, Version=10.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e],[System.String, System.Private.CoreLib, Version=10.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e]]

Quizymode.Api.Features.Items.UploadToCol.description:
InputText is the raw upload content (e.g. JSON string) used to compute a hash for duplicate detection.
Category, Keyword1, Keyword2 define navigation; Keywords are additional default keywords for all items.

Quizymode.Api.Features.Keywords.GetKeywo.description: Response DTO for a navigation keyword with aggregates.

settings.$ref: #/components/schemas/System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary`2[[System.String, System.Private.CoreLib, Version=10.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e],[System.String, System.Private.CoreLib, Version=10.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e]]

Quizymode.Api.Features.UserSettings.GetU.description: Response containing all settings for the current user as a dictionary of key-value pairs.

Quizymode.Api.Features.UserSettings.Upda.description:
Request DTO for updating a user setting.
Contains the setting key and value to store.
Response DTO containing the updated setting information.

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "Bearer {token}"
